title: We the Living
writer: Ayn Rand, Corrado Alvaro, Orio Vergani
actors: Fosco Giachetti, Alida Valli, Rossano Brazzi
plot: The time is the Russian Revolution. The place is a country burdened with fear - the midnight knock at the door, the bread hidden against famine, the haunted eyes of the fleeing, the grublike fat of the appeasers and oppressors. In...
